CustomField.description: SAL26-641: Created this field to hold report links useful for CXO team.
CustomField.formula: IF( OR(ISPICKVAL(CVE_Stage__c, '4-Engagement Completed'), ISPICKVAL(CVE_Stage__c, '5-Stalled / Discontinued'), ISPICKVAL(CVE_Stage__c, '6-CVE Not Required') ), HYPERLINK("/lightning/r/Report/"+ $Setup.CXOReport_Ids__c.CXO_Report_Id_at_creation__c +"/view?fv0="&Account__c, "View CXO Report at creation") + BR()+ BR()+ HYPERLINK("/lightning/r/Report/"+ $Setup.CXOReport_Ids__c.CXO_Report_Id_at_stage_4_and_above__c +"/view?fv0="&Account__c, "View CXO Report at stage 4 and above."), HYPERLINK("/lightning/r/Report/"+ $Setup.CXOReport_Ids__c.CXO_Report_Id_at_creation__c +"/view?fv0="&Account__c, "View CXO Report at creation") )
CustomField.label: Report Link
